# Unified Engineering Toolbox

**Purpose-built for HVAC and mechanical engineers.**<br/>
Free. Dark-themed. ASHRAE-referenced.

<br/>

[![Download](https://img.shields.io/github/v/release/Troy3408/TF-Tools-Releases?label=%E2%AC%87%20Download%20Latest&style=for-the-badge&color=3b82f6&labelColor=1a2538)](https://github.com/Troy3408/TF-Tools-Releases/releases/latest)

**Hydronic Head Loss**<br/>

### 🔄
**Auto-Updates**<br/>
<sub>Install once, stay current</sub>

<td align="center" width="250">

**ASHRAE-Referenced**<br/>
<sub>Transparent, cited methods</sub>

</td>
<td align="center" width="250">

**Standalone**<br/>
<sub>No Python or Node.js needed</sub>

## Getting Started

```
1.  Click the Download button above
2.  Run  TF-Tools-Setup-x.x.x.exe
3.  Windows may warn "Unknown publisher" → click  More info → Run anyway
4.  Launch from Start Menu or Desktop
```

> **No additional software required.** Everything is bundled in the installer.

<br/>
